label: Ingestible modifiers
description: Modifiers applied to the optimality or poison chance when a pawn with a given trait degree ingests a specific item.

ingestible.label: Ingestible
ingestible.description: ThingDef of the ingestible these modifiers apply to.

optimalityOffset.label: Optimality offset
optimalityOffset.description: Flat offset added to the pawn's food optimality score when ingesting this item.

poisonChanceOverride.label: Poison chance override
poisonChanceOverride.description: Overrides the base poisoning chance when the pawn ingests this item. Applied instead of the default chance.
